hooks.command: ROOT="$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)"; cd "$ROOT/backend"; if [ -x .venv/bin/agentlens-hook ]; then AGENTLENS_ENFORCE_APPROVALS=0 .venv/bin/agentlens-hook UserPromptSubmit --repo "$ROOT" --session-file "$ROOT/.agentlens/codex_hook_session.json"; else AGENTLENS_ENFORCE_APPROVALS=0 uv run agentlens-hook UserPromptSubmit --repo "$ROOT" --session-file "$ROOT/.agentlens/codex_hook_session.json"; fi

ROOT="$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)"; cd "$ROOT/backend"; if [ -x .venv/bin/agentlens-hook ]; then AGENTLENS_ENFORCE_APPROVALS=0 .venv/bin/agentlens-hook PreToolUse --repo "$ROOT" --session-file "$ROOT/.agentlens/codex_hook_session.json"; else AGENTLENS_ENFORCE_APPROVALS=0 uv run agentlens-hook PreToolUse --repo "$ROOT" --session-file "$ROOT/.agentlens/codex_hook_session.json"; fi

ROOT="$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)"; cd "$ROOT/backend"; if [ -x .venv/bin/agentlens-hook ]; then AGENTLENS_ENFORCE_APPROVALS=0 .venv/bin/agentlens-hook PermissionRequest --repo "$ROOT" --session-file "$ROOT/.agentlens/codex_hook_session.json"; else AGENTLENS_ENFORCE_APPROVALS=0 uv run agentlens-hook PermissionRequest --repo "$ROOT" --session-file "$ROOT/.agentlens/codex_hook_session.json"; fi
